doxygen_findings.constructor_doc: inaccurate description corrected: readlink() failure is handled by an early-return branch that skips computeSafeTerminatorIndex() and never touches buf; the helper is only invoked on the success path to clamp an at/above-capacity index. @date Last Modified bumped to Jul 11, 2026 (today) to reflect this documentation-only edit; @author list unchanged (implementing model already listed, per append-not-replace rule).
